title: shavah #7737
definition:
1) to agree with, be or become like, level, resemble
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be like
        1a2) equivalent (participle)
        1a3) to set, place
        1a4) setting (participle)
    1b) (Piel) to level, smooth, still
    1c) (Hiphil) to make like
    1d) (Nithpael) to be alike
 2) (Piel) to set, place
